deals.title: Add any easy (medium) hot drink for R25 with breakfast, sandwich or muffin
deals.tip: Use the Mugg & Bean app to earn cashback rewards. Valid at On the Move locations only, not regular Mugg & Bean.

deals.title: Coffee subscription from R18 a cup
deals.tip: 5 coffees R99 (R20/cup) · 10 coffees R199 (R20/cup) · 15 coffees R269 (R18/cup). All easy (medium) sized. Redeem once per day, within 30 days. Valid on: Cappuccino, Americano, Caffé Mocha, Caffé Latte, Filter Coffee. Download the Mugg & Bean app to buy or redeem.

deals.title: FNB eBucks: Kauai vouchers by reward level
deals.tip: Level 1: any short iced or hot drink. Level 2: small (350ml) smoothie. Level 3: large (500ml) smoothie. Level 4: R100 voucher on any item. Level 5: R120 voucher on any item. Aspire: any small (350ml) smoothie.

deals.title: Free smoothie when you achieve your Vitality weekly goal
deals.tip: Note: using this reward will forfeit your weekly game board play to earn miles.

deals.title: Vitality weekly goal: add a meal from R60
deals.tip: Redeem your weekly goal as an instant reward and add a meal: selected Breakfast item from R60 · Sourdough Toastie from R70 · selected Meal item from R93.

deals.title: ClubCard cashback: up to 25% back with Vitality
deals.tip: 1 point per R5 spent (2% back). Spend R600+ for 4% back. Stack PayDay Savings for up to 14% back total. Add Clicks to Discovery Vitality for up to 25% back. Cashback paid on the 20th. Must swipe ClubCard. Points valid 12 months.

deals.title: Buy 2 get 1 free special
deals.tip: Bonus: buy Vitality products to stack and earn extra rewards. Filter by Vitality on the Clicks website.

deals.title: FNB Easy Bundle: 99c bread at Pick n Pay, 4x a month
deals.tip: FNB Easy Bundle customers pay just 99c for a loaf of brown or white bread from Pick n Pay bakeries, up to 4 times a month.

deals.title: FNB Virtual Card: R50 off at Starbucks (R75+ purchase)
deals.tip: Get a complimentary R50-off voucher on any Starbucks purchase of R75+ when you make at least 5 weekly payments using your FNB Virtual Card (or FNB Pay/digital wallets). Valid at participating Starbucks. Premier/Private Clients/RMB: reward level 2+ required. FNBy/FNBy Next: 18+ eligible.

deals.title: #MakeMyMonday: coffee & hot chocolate from R22
deals.tip: R22 for 240ml · R27 for 350ml · R32 for 480ml. Every Monday only. Redeem on the Krispy Kreme app.

deals.title: #ChillerTuesday: two 350ml Chillers for 50% off
deals.tip: Every Tuesday only. Redeem on the Krispy Kreme app.

deals.title: Free doughnut just for downloading the Krispy Kreme app
deals.tip: Find the reward under the Offers tab after downloading the Krispy Kreme app.

deals.title: Capitec Live Better: Spotify discount via Spend Better
deals.tip: Activate Live Better in the Capitec app and check Spend Better for the current Spotify offer. Partner offers update monthly — check the app on Live Better Day (the 10th) for active deals. All Capitec cardholders eligible.

deals.title: FNB Virtual Card: up to 40% back on streaming subscriptions
deals.tip: Route all streaming payments (Showmax, Spotify, Apple TV+, etc.) through your FNB virtual card. At Reward Level 4 and 5 you can earn up to 40% back in eBucks on selected eBucks streaming partners. Check the eBucks app for your active partner list.

deals.title: FNB eBucks: up to R8 per litre back at Engen
deals.tip: Link your eBucks card to Engen for up to R8 per litre back in eBucks — exact rate depends on your FNB Reward Level. Swipe your eBucks card at the pump or use Pay in eBucks via the FNB App. Higher reward levels earn significantly more per litre.

deals.title: UCount CYOR: up to 40% back on Checkers Sixty60 orders
deals.tip: Choose Groceries as your CYOR (Choose Your Own Rewards) category and order groceries via Checkers Sixty60 online. Tier 5 credit card holders earn 40% back in UCount Rewards Points on Sixty60 orders. Cap: lower of 20% of total card spend or R3,000 per cycle.

deals.title: BP Rewards: 20–45c per litre cashback at the pump
deals.tip: Swipe your BP Rewards card (20c/l base) plus one partner card: add PnP Smart Shopper = 30c/l combined; add Nedbank Greenbacks = 45c/l combined. Discovery Insure Vitality Drive clients can earn up to 50% of their monthly fuel spend back. Minimum R20 balance to redeem.

deals.title: Birthday bonus: buy a dozen, get a dozen Original Glazed free
deals.tip: Download the app at least 48 hours before your birthday to qualify.

deals.title: VISA Premium: Uber & Uber Eats vouchers via SSA Rewards Engine
deals.tip: VISA Platinum, Signature, and Infinite cardholders can access Uber and Uber Eats vouchers through the VISA SSA Rewards Engine. Navigate to visaoffers.razorpay.africa, validate your premium VISA card number, and check your active voucher inventory. Vouchers are personalised to your card tier.

deals.title: VISA Premium: free Spotify Premium trial and subscription credits
deals.tip: VISA Platinum, Signature, and Infinite cardholders can access free Spotify Premium trials and multi-month subscription credits via the VISA SSA Rewards Engine at visaoffers.razorpay.africa. Validate your premium card and check your active offers.

deals.title: FNB eBucks: up to 15% back at Pick n Pay and SPAR
deals.tip: FNB clients at higher reward levels earn up to 15% back in eBucks on qualifying purchases at Pick n Pay and SPAR. Use your FNB virtual card for purchases to maximise your earn rate. Check your current rate in the FNB app under eBucks partners.

deals.title: UCount CYOR: stack Uber One rewards with UCount
deals.tip: UCount members can select Entertainment or Online Shopping as their CYOR (Choose Your Own Rewards) category. Pay for Uber One and Uber Eats with your Standard Bank credit card to earn UCount Rewards Points on these purchases. Tier 5 clients earn the highest rates. Check ucount.standardbank.co.za for current active category rates.

deals.title: Nedbank Greenbacks: 25c per litre cashback at BP
deals.tip: Swipe your Nedbank card at BP service stations to earn 25c per litre cashback in Greenbacks. This stacks on top of your BP Rewards base card (20c/l), giving you a combined 45c/l. Note: the 25c bonus does not apply when paying with the Greenbacks SHOP Card.
